name: Tortilla Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the ground cumin, ground red pepper, and salt.
2. Brush melted margarine over one side of each tortilla and sprinkle with the spice mixture.
3. Brush each tortilla lightly to distribute the margarine evenly.
4. Make two stacks of the tortillas.
5. Cut each stack into 1/2-inch wide strips.
6. Place the tortilla strips in a single layer on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the strips are crisped and lightly browned.
8. Serve with Chili-Cheese dip.
